title: Figure 2 in Cryptosporidium spp. in wild rodents in the Poyang Lake region, China
author: Zuo, Qingqiu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2. Representative agarose gel image showing PCR amplification products of the small subunit (SSU) rRNA genes of Cryptosporidium spp. (expected band size 830 bp). Marker: DL 2000 DNA marker; N: negative control; P: positive control; Lanes 1–5: samples.
